what_it_does: Documents the ConceptV Virtual Hub UI kit — the buyer-facing, panotour-style immersive property viewer with a minimal dark overlay. Describes the photo-first layout, the placement of overlay UI elements, a component inventory table mapping each .jsx file to its role, and how the index.html demo mounts the full hub experience.
observations: Frames the Virtual Hub as the buyer-facing side: end-users land here after a ConceptV customer publishes a project.

Layout section specifies positions: bottom-centre MENU, CLOSE in the Quick Menu, right-anchored 360px side panels, full-bleed Floorplan overlay, top-left brand bug + Hub switcher, floating comment-capture popup.
Component table lists eight files: HubFrame, HubBug, MenuButton, QuickMenu, InfoPanel, SharePanel, FloorplanOverlay, CaptureComment.
Demo section describes index.html interactions: open MENU, swap right-side panels, click photo to drop a capture comment.
standouts: Names two components (HubFrame, HubBug, FloorplanOverlay, CaptureComment) beyond the batch's .jsx files — the kit's full surface inventory.
Specific 360px side-panel width and concrete hub-switcher examples (Entry / Apartment A / Apartment B).
conventions: Standard UI-kit README shape: purpose, layout, component table, demo.
Describes the vh-* overlay pattern the .jsx components implement.
notes: The orientation doc for the Virtual Hub kit — buyer-facing immersive viewer with a dark overlay; read this to know how the eight components fit together.
purpose_vs_actual: Matches: it documents the kit and its components, and the described roles align with the InfoPanel/MenuButton/QuickMenu/SharePanel files in this batch.
apparent_themes: Spatial comment capture on the render
intention_signals: Aims to define a cohesive end-user viewing experience for published ConceptV projects — immersive render with unobtrusive controls, panel switching, sharing, and click-to-comment capture.
novelty: The capture-comment-anchored-to-a-clicked-point interaction and the gyro/panotour immersive framing for real estate.
contribution: Contributes the buyer-facing Virtual Hub concept and its component map: a photo-first immersive viewer with overlay menu, info/share panels, floorplan, hub switching, and spatial comment capture.
summary_for_embedding: README documenting the ConceptV Virtual Hub UI kit — a buyer-facing immersive panotour property viewer with a dark overlay menu, info/share/floorplan panels, and click-to-drop comment capture.
intention_for_embedding: To explain how the Virtual Hub presents published projects to end-users and how its eight overlay components fit together.
